headline: Semis & streaming deeply oversold vs. energy & defense overbought — Iran deal is the pivot that flips both; chip earnings binary overrides all oversold reads this week.
Semiconductor sell-off (TSM capex scare) creates highest-quality oversold setups; crude/defense overbought on Iran risk — vol not yet at fade-worthy spike.

status_label: 11 SETUPS · MIXED — IBM KNIFE / IRAN OB ENERGY
headline: ELV and managed care oversold on earnings sell-the-news; energy/financials overbought on Iran shock — IBM a falling knife, not a reversion; vol not spiking.
IBM's historic -25% crash flooded enterprise software with oversold setups, while Hormuz oil spike leaves energy ETFs stretched overbought — VIX calm at 16.5, no vol fade today.
IBM's 20%+ crash and Iran oil spike create dual extremes — oversold software vs overbought energy — but CPI + Warsh testimony today override every technical setup.
